bead.title: try.Attempt: relocate decomposition and push outcome routing
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The execute loop still owns the terminal routing for declined_needs_decomposition, push_failed, and push_conflict. Those outcomes are not just presentation details: they decide whether a bead is parked, which event is emitted, and whether the claim is released, so keeping them in the loop means try.Attempt does not own the full outcome classification contract.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:1063-1160 branches inline on ExecuteBeadStatusDeclinedNeedsDecomposition, ExecuteBeadStatusPushFailed, and ExecuteBeadStatusPushConflict, emits the corresponding events, and applies the cooldowns.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_status.go:320-333 classifies push_failed / push_conflict from a merged outcome, but the loop still performs the actual parking and event emission.
- cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go:99-137 only returns the legacy conflict-recovery outcome and does not yet absorb these routes.

PROPOSED FIX
- Extend cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go so decomposition and push-failure / push-conflict policies return structured disposition + cooldown + event instructions.
- Preserve the current event payloads and labels (decomposition-recommendation, push-failed, push-conflict) and keep the cooldown caps unchanged.
- Remove the corresponding branches from execute_bead_loop.go so the loop only consumes the structured attempt result.
- Keep push_failed claim refusal and cooldown persistence semantics intact.

NON-SCOPE
- No_changes adjudication.
- Rate-limit retry policy.
- Any change to the push-failure / push-conflict status taxonomy.

INTERSECTIONS
- Preserves ddx-fba752b9 / ddx-af54ebf3 / push-conflict behavior while moving ownership into try.Attempt.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestAttempt_DeclinedNeedsDecomposition_ParksWithStructuredEvent verifies try.Attempt returns the decomposition recommendation and park instructions rather than leaving the loop to classify it.
2. TestAttempt_PushFailed_ParksWithCooldown and TestAttempt_PushConflict_ParksWithCooldown verify the attempt layer owns the push-failed and push-conflict parking behavior.
3. TestExecuteBeadWorkerDeclinedNeedsDecompositionParksBead, TestExecuteBeadWorkerPushFailedStaysOpenAndParks, TestExecuteBeadWorkerPushFailedCooldownCappedAt24h, and TestExecuteBeadWorkerPushConflictParksAndEmitsEvent remain green after the move.
4. TestClaimRefusesPushFailedBead still fails loudly until the operator clears execute-loop-last-status.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
